title: nepeta deflersiana
intro: Nepeta deflersiana, also known as the Horned Catmint, is a perennial plant species native to the island of Socotra in Yemen. The plant's leaves and flowers possess medicinal properties, containing essential oils and flavonoids with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta deflersiana include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
